items.title: SharkNinja's Obsession With Winning Drives Growth, Says Analyst
items.description: SharkNinja (NYSE:SN) is ramping up growth with an ambitious push across its full product lineup, leveraging innovative launches, expanded distribution, and direct-to-consumer initiatives to capture new markets and drive sales momentum into 2026. Bank of America reiterated a Buy rating on SharkNinja with a $140 price forecast, based on 24 times its 2026 EPS estimate of $5.75. Analyst Alexander Perry emphasized that the company aims to “win with every SKU, every week,” highlighting SharkNinja’s di

items.title: Credit Card Giants Visa and Stripe Team Up With Fold to Launch Bitcoin Rewards Card – Wall Street Coming to Crypto?
items.description: Fold Holdings, the Bitcoin financial services company, has announced a major collaboration with Visa and Stripe to launch the Fold Bitcoin Rewards Credit Card. The new product, revealed in a Tuesday press release, is designed to make earning Bitcoin from everyday purchases accessible to mainstream consumers by integrating with Visa’s ...

items.title: Fold Stock Pops, Then Plunges After Revealing Bitcoin Rewards Visa Credit Card Plans
items.description: Bitcoin rewards company Fold (FLD) opened strong Tuesday on credit card news, but it’s falling again after a rough Monday.

items.title: Men’s underwear, cardboard boxes, and giant skeletons: Offbeat recession indicators to watch
items.description: Though there are more reliable ways to track an economic downturn, some have also seen "recession indicators" in fashion trends, cardboard boxes, and "little treats."

items.title: Fold Teaming With Stripe for Its Bitcoin Rewards Credit Card
items.description: The card will run on the Visa network and offers 2% in rewards, with potential for that to rise to as high as 3.5%.
